projectDescription: Sengol is an AI-powered pre-deployment risk assessment and compliance platform that delivers quantitative risk scores across five domains, backed by 100,000+ real-world security incidents from 40+ jurisdictions.
keyFeatures: Pre-deployment AI risk assessment across Performance, Security, Compliance, and Operational dimensions
Evidence-based scoring from 100,000+ real-world security incidents
Compliance validation for EU AI Act, GDPR, HIPAA, SOC 2, ISO 42001, NIST AI RMF, and 40+ jurisdictions
Five risk domains: AI/ML, Cybersecurity, Cloud Infrastructure, Data Governance, Supply Chain
PDF and Excel export of professional audit-ready reports
Team collaboration with shared projects and assessments
REST API access for integrating risk intelligence into applications
Real-time incident intelligence from 200+ global sources
Board-level compliance dashboard with trending and benchmarking
AI Review Board with multi-model analysis (Team plan+)
publicApiSurface: REST API: POST /assessments — start a new risk assessment
REST API: GET /assessments/{id} — retrieve assessment results and risk scores
REST API: POST /projects — create a project
REST API: GET /projects/{id}/assessments — list assessments for a project
REST API: GET /risk-scores/{assessmentId} — get detailed risk scores breakdown
REST API: GET /reports/{assessmentId} — export assessment report (PDF/Excel)
Risk score dimensions: performance, security, compliance, operational (0-100 scale)
Compliance frameworks: EU AI Act, GDPR, CCPA, HIPAA, SOC 2, ISO 27001, ISO 42001, PCI-DSS, NIST AI RMF
Rate limits: Growth API 500 req/hour, Enterprise API 2,000 req/hour
